ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the clothing size (e.g., S, M, L, XL, 2XL) */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., adult, kid, infant) */,
  "size_group" TEXT /* Group of the size (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size ID from the sizes table */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement for the size */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement for the size */,
  "sleeve" TEXT /* Sleeve measurement for the size */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length measurement for the size */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item (e.g., T-shirt, Dress) */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing item (e.g., casual, formal) */,
  "item_sub_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of clothing item (e.g., short sleeve, long sleeve) */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size ID available for the item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item (e.g., cotton, polyester) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_item_sizes" (
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item-size entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item ID from the clothing_items table */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size ID from the sizes table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_item_sizes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_item_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "sub_category_description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category ID from the item_categories table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES item_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer ID */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item ID from the clothing_items table */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size ID from the sizes table */,
  "preference_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
